notes: A-share single-agent dashboard run on the happy path: three tool round-trips then a fenced dashboard JSON that the real parse_dashboard_json accepts.

input.task: 分析贵州茅台的投资价值

transcript.content:
根据行情、趋势与筹码数据，输出决策仪表盘：
```json
{
  "stock_name": "贵州茅台",
  "sentiment_score": 62,
  "trend_prediction": "短期震荡上行",
  "operation_advice": "持有",
  "decision_type": "hold",
  "confidence_level": "中",
  "dashboard": {
    "core_conclusion": {
      "one_sentence": "多头结构完好，回踩MA5可低吸",
      "signal_type": "🟡持有观望",
      "position_advice": {
        "no_position": "回踩MA5企稳后轻仓介入",
        "has_position": "继续持有，跌破MA10减仓"
      }
    },
    "battle_plan": {"support": 98.0, "resistance": 105.0, "stop_loss": 95.0},
    "phase_decision": {
      "phase_context": "非交易时段基于最近收盘数据分析",
      "action_window": "次一交易日开盘后",
      "immediate_action": "暂不操作",
      "watch_conditions": "放量突破105或缩量回踩98",
      "next_check_time": "次日开盘",
      "confidence_reason": "行情与K线数据完整，趋势结构清晰",
      "data_limitations": "无"
    }
  },
  "analysis_summary": "均线多头排列，量能正常，筹码获利比例健康，短期以持有为主。",
  "key_points": "MA5>MA10>MA20；获利盘62%；筹码集中度12%",
  "risk_warning": "估值偏高需关注；若跌破MA20需止损",
  "buy_reason": "趋势延续且不追高",
  "trend_analysis": "上升通道内运行",
  "technical_analysis": "均线多头排列，趋势评分78"
}
```

core_conclusion.one_sentence: 多头结构完好，回踩MA5可低吸

phase_decision.phase_context: 非交易时段基于最近收盘数据分析
phase_decision.confidence_reason: 行情与K线数据完整，趋势结构清晰

dashboard.analysis_summary: 均线多头排列，量能正常，筹码获利比例健康，短期以持有为主。
dashboard.risk_warning: 估值偏高需关注；若跌破MA20需止损
dashboard.technical_analysis: 均线多头排列，趋势评分78
